'''ravate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:quaintly|quaintly]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| r-v-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:quaintly|quaintly]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ravate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:ravate|ravate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ravatesher|ravatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravatesherĂ«m|ravatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ravatero|ravatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ravateshĂ«|ravateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravateshĂ«m|ravateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiravatero|gokiravatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiravateshĂ«|gokiravateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravateshĂ«m|gokiravateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goravankerom|goravankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goravankeshĂ«|goravankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravankeshĂ«m|goravankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goravankeya|goravankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ravaterom|ravaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravatemu|ravatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ravateya|ravateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiravaterom|gokiravaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravatemu|gokiravatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiravateya|gokiravateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:ravavate|ravavate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:ravavatesher|ravavatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavatesherĂ«m|ravavatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ravavatero|ravavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:ravavateshĂ«|ravavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavateshĂ«m|ravavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiravavatero|gokiravavatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokiravavateshĂ«|gokiravavateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavateshĂ«m|gokiravavateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:goravavankerom|goravavankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goravavankeshĂ«|goravavankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goravavankeshĂ«m|goravavankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:goravavankeya|goravavankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:ravavaterom|ravavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:ravavatemu|ravavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:ravavateya|ravavateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokiravavaterom|gokiravavaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokiravavatemu|gokiravavatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokiravavateya|gokiravavateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠte|rĂŠvĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠtesher|rĂŠvĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m|rĂŠvĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠtero|rĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|rĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|rĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠtero|gokirĂŠvĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«|gokirĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m|gokirĂŠvĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorĂŠvĂŠnkerom|gorĂŠvĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«|gorĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m|gorĂŠvĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorĂŠvĂŠnkeya|gorĂŠvĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠterom|rĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠtemu|rĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rĂŠvĂŠteya|rĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠterom|gokirĂŠvĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠtemu|gokirĂŠvĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirĂŠvĂŠteya|gokirĂŠvĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:rafvafte|rafvafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:rafvaftesher|rafvaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafvaftesherĂ«m|rafvaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafvaftero|rafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:rafvafteshĂ«|rafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafvafteshĂ«m|rafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafvaftero|gokirafvaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokirafvafteshĂ«|gokirafvafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafvafteshĂ«m|gokirafvafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gorafvafnkerom|gorafvafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gorafvafnkeshĂ«|gorafvafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gorafvafnkeshĂ«m|gorafvafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gorafvafnkeya|gorafvafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:rafvafterom|rafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:rafvaftemu|rafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:rafvafteya|rafvafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokirafvafterom|gokirafvafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokirafvaftemu|gokirafvaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokirafvafteya|gokirafvafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
